mapper.select:
SELECT id, tenant_code, tenant_name, contact_name, contact_email, status, is_default, expire_time, created_at FROM sys_tenant WHERE deleted = 0
AND (tenant_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tenant_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted = 0
